overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates covered sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and continues along streets lined with massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The wet streets reflect the vibrant neon lights, creating a distinctive cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath building overhang with neon facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beside a building with vertical pink neon lighting, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall building with vertical pink and red neon strip lighting running up the facade
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet reflective asphalt
elevated walkway structure crossing above the street ahead
multi-lane road with futuristic cars and vehicles passing by

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk next to a building illuminated by vertical pink neon strips. The wet concrete reflects the neon glow, and a yellow crosswalk is visible to the left. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street in the distance as vehicles pass by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection area with wider sky visibility
crossing the wet street at the marked crosswalk with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, joining a group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection as pedestrians cross

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens on building facades across the street
traffic lights suspended over the intersection showing red signals

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection. A group of pedestrians waits at the crosswalk before crossing the wet asphalt together. Digital billboards illuminate the buildings across the street while a futuristic car drives through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk lined with massive digital advertising displays and holographic billboards

events.description: arriving on opposite sidewalk with continuous wall of digital billboards on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk passing large holographic advertisements and digital screens on the right wall

entered.detail: continuous wall of large digital screens displaying various advertisements and brand imagery
floating holographic signs and three-dimensional brand displays extending from the wall
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character walks along an open sidewalk bordered by a massive wall of digital billboards and holographic advertisements on the right. The wet pavement reflects the shifting colors of the neon signs. A metal railing separates the walkway from the street where sparse traffic continues to pass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, neon-drenched intersection and finally along a corridor of towering digital displays. It begins beside a building illuminated by vertical pink neon strips, moving across wet concrete that reflects the glow as an overhead pedestrian bridge looms in the distance. As the character emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a broad intersection where pedestrians cross the rain-slicked asphalt alongside passing futuristic vehicles. The camera then follows the character across the street, shifting toward an open sidewalk bordered by a massive wall of holographic advertisements and shifting digital billboards. Finally, the movement continues along a metal railing, with the wet pavement mirroring the vibrant, changing colors of the surrounding city lights.
